//Loc x y
0 0.0 0.0 "depot"
1 0.0 404.0 "product aisle 0 bloc 0 rank 40"
2 48.0 894.0 "product aisle 1 bloc 1 rank 46"
3 144.0 326.0 "product aisle 3 bloc 0 rank 27"
4 96.0 985.0 "product aisle 2 bloc 1 rank 59"
